ogTitle: Jollys Lookout vs Jondaryan: Climate Safety

heading: Jollys Lookout vs Jondaryan — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Jollys Lookout, Queensland and Jondaryan, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Jondaryan has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Jollys Lookout (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Jollys Lookout or Jondaryan safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Jollys Lookout has a flood risk score of 30/100, while Jondaryan scores 24/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Jollys Lookout scores 61/100 for bushfire risk. Jondaryan scores 25/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Jollys Lookout or Jondaryan?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Jondaryan has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.37% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
